name: Omega Institute for Holistic Studies
description: Omega Institute for Holistic Studies is a nonprofit holistic learning center founded in 1977, located on 250 acres in Rhinebeck, New York, in the Hudson Valley. It is one of the largest holistic education centers in the US, offering workshops, retreats, and conferences in meditation, yoga, creativity, health, and personal growth. Omega hosts leading teachers from diverse contemplative traditions and serves over 20,000 participants annually.
